Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Resposnes From Deft Allen To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions (C.C.P. Sections 2030.300, 2031.310, 2033.290)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Dennis Birkhimer's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Kenneth Allen To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, and Request For Production Of Documents is granted. The responses are inadequate and incomplete. Defendant Kenneth Allen is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses From Deft Georgalos To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions (C.C.P. Sections 2030.300, 2031.310, 2033.290)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Dennis Birkhimer's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Tom Georgalos To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, and Request For Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is denied as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 2.3, 2.4, 2.12, and 2.13 as they are irrelevant and overly broad.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 2.11, 4.1, 4.2, 12.1-12.7, 14.1, 14.2, and 17.1. Incident may be used for all of the circumstances surrounding the allegations of the complaint, and the term is not limited to a single event.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 50.1-50.6.
The motion is granted as to Requests For Admission Nos. 4-16.
The motion is denied as to Document Request Nos. 1 and 2.
The motion is granted as to Document Request Nos. 3, 11-15, 17, 19, and 22-28.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 20 and 21. The objections are ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 31-33. The responses do not comply with the requirements of 2031.230.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this hearing.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
